step1.title: What is the session?
step1.placeholder_goal: e.g. Gain insight into how the team experienced the sprint...

step2.mode_title: How do you want to add questions?

manual.label: Write yourself
manual.desc: Write and manage your own questions

ai.label: AI generate
ai.desc: Give a prompt, we generate questions

step2.multiple_choice_validation_hint: Multiple choice needs at least 2 answers (3–5 recommended).
step2.multiple_choice_validation_error: One or more multiple choice questions has fewer than 2 answers.
step2.ai_greeting: I see session "{{title}}" with goal: "{{goal}}". Tell me which aspect to focus on, or click 'Generate now'.
step2.ai_greeting_empty: Tell me what the session is about, or click 'Generate now'.
step2.ai_consent: I agree that my session title and goal will be processed by AI
step2.ai_consent_required: Please consent to AI processing to generate questions

ai_consent_v2.title: AI-Powered Generation
ai_consent_v2.description: We'll use AI to suggest questions based on your session goal
ai_consent_v2.checkbox: I consent to AI processing my session title and goal

step2.ai_review_subtitle: Adjust questions or types before continuing
step2.ai_regenerate_confirm: Regenerating will replace your edited questions. Continue?
step2.all_dismissed: All questions dismissed. Go back to regenerate.
step2.template_seeded_hint: Edit, remove, or add questions before you continue.
step2.template_pick_from_dashboard: Choose a template from the Templates tab to seed this step.
step2.auto_scale_hint: Auto-generated 5-point scale: Strongly disagree -> Strongly agree
step2.free_text_hint: Participants type a free-text response - no options needed

snelste-vinger.name: Quick Finger
snelste-vinger.desc: Who is fastest with the right answer?

team-quiz.name: Team Quiz
team-quiz.desc: Short competitive quiz to warm up

woordenwolk.name: Word Cloud
woordenwolk.desc: Participants type one word, visible together

mode.label: Session mode
mode.fun_desc: Speed up with automatic question timing

step5.title: Overview & launch
step5.consent_text: By launching the session you agree to the privacy statement. Answers are processed in accordance with your anonymity settings.
step5.launch_error: Failed to launch session. Please try again.

draft.banner: You have a saved draft. Would you like to continue?

auth_gate.title: Log in to get started
auth_gate.subtitle: You need an account to create a session
auth_gate.sent: Check your inbox — we sent a link to {{email}}

edit_mode.banner: You are editing an existing session
edit_mode.active_session_warning: Questions cannot be changed while the session is active
